name: fair_repair_from_rehmixh015_supportp4_lr1e6_anchor1_reh025_200_4096_eager_frozenrepro
description: Fair short benchmark-shape repair from the high-CEDR-margin checkpoint. Multilabel support episodes historically improved RuSTS and kept Georeview clustering closer than circle loss from the clean base, but did not solve CEDR. Starting from the high-CEDR checkpoint tests whether a small anchored dose can recover the remaining geometric gaps while preserving released CEDR.
